'''shazaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crabmeat|crabmeat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-z-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crabmeat|crabmeat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shazaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæzæzæth|shæzæzæth]] || [[word:shæzæzæj|shæzæzæj]] || [[word:shæzæzæsh|shæzæzæsh]] || [[word:shæzæzæ|shæzæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shazazazath|shazazazath]] || [[word:shazazazaj|shazazazaj]] || [[word:shazazazash|shazazazash]] || [[word:shazazaza|shazazaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shazazath|shazazath]] || [[word:shazazaj|shazazaj]] || [[word:shazazash|shazazash]] || [[word:shazaza|shazaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shazafzafth|shazafzafth]] || [[word:shazafzafj|shazafzafj]] || [[word:shazafzafsh|shazafzafsh]] || [[word:shazafzaf|shazafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shazazatha|shazazatha]] || [[word:shazazaja|shazazaja]] || [[word:shazazasha|shazazasha]] || [[word:shazazaka|shazazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shazazath|shazazath]] || [[word:shazazaj|shazazaj]] || [[word:shazazash|shazazash]] || [[word:shazaza|shazaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shazazathal|shazazathal]] || [[word:shazazajal|shazazajal]] || [[word:shazazashal|shazazashal]] || [[word:shazazakal|shazazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shazazaathatha|shazazaathatha]] || [[word:shazazaajaja|shazazaajaja]] || [[word:shazazaashasha|shazazaashasha]] || [[word:shazazaaka|shazazaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shazazathan|shazazathan]] || [[word:shazazajan|shazazajan]] || [[word:shazazashan|shazazashan]] || [[word:shazazakan|shazazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shazazathaoro|shazazathaoro]] || [[word:shazazajaoro|shazazajaoro]] || [[word:shazazashaoro|shazazashaoro]] || [[word:shazazakaoro|shazazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
